Entry.heading: Modular Consoles – Action Required
Entry.long_description:
[h1]The original Modular Consoles Mod is no longer maintained - What happened?[/h1] Tom, the original developer of [b]Modular Consoles[/b], has been unreachable for some time. I don't know the details, and I wish him well - but in his absence, the mod has broken on recent game versions and there is no way for me to push fixes to Tom's Workshop entry.
[h1]What are we doing about it?[/h1]
I have taken over maintenance of the mod under my own Workshop page. The new version is up to date, actively maintained, and a drop-in replacement for our original.
Clicking [b]Migrate[/b] below will automatically unsubscribe you from the old entry and subscribe you to the maintained version on my (WIKUS's) workshop. [b]Your saves are safe.[/b]
[h1]A note from me[/h1] I'm sorry you're seeing this at all — this isn't how any of us wanted things to go. Tom helpted me built something great, and we're just trying to make sure it keeps working for everyone.
— [b]Wikus with a little help from JacksonTheMaster, Aproposmath and Inaki [/b]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3452651592]View the maintained Workshop page[/url]

Entry.heading: LibConstruct – Action Required
Entry.long_description:
[h1]The original LibConstruct Mod is no longer maintained[/h1] But wait - what even is LibConstruct? [b]LibConstruct[/b] is a shared library that [b]Modular Consoles[/b] and some other mods depends on. It was authored by Tom_is_unlucky, who has been unreachable for some time. We don't know the details, and we wish him well - but in his absence, the mod has broken on recent game versions and there is no way for us to push fixes to his Workshop entry.
[h1]What are we doing about it?[/h1] Just like Modular Consoles, We've published a maintained version under WIKUS's Workshop page. Clicking [b]Migrate[/b] will unsubscribe you from the old entry and subscribe you to the working one automatically.
— [b]Wikus with a little help from JacksonTheMaster, Aproposmath and Inaki [/b]
[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3328065049]View the maintained Workshop page[/url]
